Reasoning
Q1
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
Seven people K, J, I, H, G, F and E. All of them
have their birthdays in different months namely
January, March, April, May, June, July and
August. No two persons share the same birthday
month. K's birthday is in January. There are the
same number of person having their birthday
before and after I. Only one person's birthday is
there between H and I. J's birthday is in the
month having 31 days but not in August. There
are two person's birthday between J and E. G's
birthday is before F's birthday. J's birthday is not
before I.
Four among the five are same in a certain way
thus form a group. Who among the following is
odd one out?
(A) K
(B) H
(C) G
(D) F
(E) I
Q2
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
Seven people K, J, I, H, G, F and E. All of them
have their birthdays in different months namely
January, March, April, May, June, July and
August. No two persons share the same birthday
month. K's birthday is in January. There are the
same number of person having their birthday
before and after I. Only one person's birthday is
there between H and I. J's birthday is in the
month having 31 days but not in August. There
are two person's birthday between J and E. G's
birthday is before F's birthday. J's birthday is not
before I.
How many persons have their birthday before J?
(A) One
(B) Two
(C) Three
(D) Four
(E) More than four
Q3
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
Seven people K, J, I, H, G, F and E. All of them
have their birthdays in different months namely
January, March, April, May, June, July and
August. No two persons share the same birthday
month. K's birthday is in January. There are the
same number of person having their birthday
before and after I. Only one person's birthday is
there between H and I. J's birthday is in the
month having 31 days but not in August. There
are two person's birthday between J and E. G's
birthday is before F's birthday. J's birthday is not
before I.
In which month does H have his birthday?
(A) March
(B) April
(C) May
(D) June
Q4
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
Seven people K, J, I, H, G, F and E. All of them
have their birthdays in different months namely
January, March, April, May, June, July and
August. No two persons share the same birthday
month. K's birthday is in January. There are the
same number of person having their birthday
before and after I. Only one person's birthday is
there between H and I. J's birthday is in the
month having 31 days but not in August. There
are two person's birthday between J and E. G's
birthday is before F's birthday. J's birthday is not
before I.
Who is having his birthday at the last?
 
Scheduling Puzzles -02 
Level-1

(A) F
(B) E
(C) I
(D) G
(E) None of these
Q5
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Seven people K, J, I, H, G, F and E. All of them
have their birthdays in different months namely
January, March, April, May, June, July and
August. No two persons share the same birthday
month. K's birthday is in January. There are the
same number of person having their birthday
before and after I. Only one person's birthday is
there between H and I. J's birthday is in the
month having 31 days but not in August. There
are two person's birthday between J and E. G's
birthday is before F's birthday. J's birthday is not
before I.
 
Whose birthday is in the month of June?
(A) J
(B) I
(C) H
(D) G
(E) F
Q6
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Six employees Z, Y, X, A, B and C of a company
went for a trip in the different months January,
March, April, May, July and August but not
necessarily in the same order. A went for a trip in
the month of 30 days. There is only one
employee who went for a trip between A and X.
There are only two employees who went for a
trip between X and Z. B went for a trip before Z.
The number of employees who went for a trip
before B is the same number of employees who
went for a trip after C. Y does not go for a trip in
August.
 
Four of the following five are alike in a certain
way based on their positions in the above
arrangement and so form a group. Which of the
following does not belong to the group?
(A) April - Z
(B) August - X
(C) May - A
(D) January - B
(E) July - Y
Q7
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Six employees Z, Y, X, A, B and C of a company
went for a trip in the different months January,
March, April, May, July and August but not
necessarily in the same order. A went for a trip in
the month of 30 days. There is only one
employee who went for a trip between A and X.
There are only two employees who went for a
trip between X and Z. B went for a trip before Z.
The number of employees who went for a trip
before B is the same number of employees who
went for a trip after C. Y does not go for a trip in
August.
 
How many employees went before B ?
(A) None
(B) Three
(C) Five
(D) Two
(E) None of these
Q8
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Six employees Z, Y, X, A, B and C of a company
went for a trip in the different months January,
March, April, May, July and August but not
necessarily in the same order. A went for a trip in
the month of 30 days. There is only one
employee who went for a trip between A and X.
There are only two employees who went for a
trip between X and Z. B went for a trip before Z.
The number of employees who went for a trip
before B is the same number of employees who
went for a trip after C. Y does not go for a trip in
August.

In which of the following month does C go for a
trip?
(A) January
(B) August
(C) July
(D) March
(E) None of these
Q9
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Six employees Z, Y, X, A, B and C of a company
went for a trip in the different months January,
March, April, May, July and August but not
necessarily in the same order. A went for a trip in
the month of 30 days. There is only one
employee who went for a trip between A and X.
There are only two employees who went for a
trip between X and Z. B went for a trip before Z.
The number of employees who went for a trip
before B is the same number of employees who
went for a trip after C. Y does not go for a trip in
August.
 
Which of the following employees went on a trip
in May ?
(A) B
(B) C
(C) Y
(D) Z
(E) None of these
Q10
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Six employees Z, Y, X, A, B and C of a company
went for a trip in the different months January,
March, April, May, July and August but not
necessarily in the same order. A went for a trip in
the month of 30 days. There is only one
employee who went for a trip between A and X.
There are only two employees who went for a
trip between X and Z. B went for a trip before Z.
The number of employees who went for a trip
before B is the same number of employees who
went for a trip after C. Y does not go for a trip in
August.
 
Which of the following statements is true with
respect to the final arrangement ?
(A) Two employees went for a trip before Z.
(B) A went on a trip in July.
(C) There were four employees who went for a
trip between B and C.
(D) C went on trip just before Z.
(E) None of these
Q11
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
There are six members (P,Q,R,S,T and U) in a
family. They all play different games. They play
these games in six different months viz. March,
April, May, June, July and August, but not
necessarily in the same order. March is the first
month and August is the last one. The rest follow
the same order.
Games : Cricket, Carrom, Chess, Football, Tennis
and Ludo.
The person who plays Ludo, is playing in the
month having 31 days. P plays cricket, before R. R
doesn’t play Football. Two people play their
games between T and R. T plays Chess. Neither T
nor R plays in the month having 30 days. The
person who plays Tennis, is playing immediately
after the one who plays Ludo. S plays
immediately before P. The one who plays Tennis,
is playing in the month having 31 days. Q doesn’t
play in the month having 31 days. The one who
plays Carrom, is playing in the month having 31
days.
How many people are playing between S and
U?
(A) 4
(B) 3
(C) 2
(D) 1
(E) 5
Q12
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
There are six members (P,Q,R,S,T and U) in a
family. They all play different games. They play
these games in six different months viz. March,
April, May, June, July and August, but not

necessarily in the same order. March is the first
month and August is the last one. The rest follow
the same order.
Games : Cricket, Carrom, Chess, Football, Tennis
and Ludo.
The person who plays Ludo, is playing in the
month having 31 days. P plays cricket, before R. R
doesn’t play Football. Two people play their
games between T and R. T plays Chess. Neither T
nor R plays in the month having 30 days. The
person who plays Tennis, is playing immediately
after the one who plays Ludo. S plays
immediately before P. The one who plays Tennis,
is playing in the month having 31 days. Q doesn’t
play in the month having 31 days. The one who
plays Carrom, is playing in the month having 31
days.
If Q is related to Cricket and T is related to
Carrom, then in the same way, who is related to
Football?
(A) U
(B) S
(C) P
(D) R
(E) None of these

Q11
Text Solution:
1. Neither T nor R plays in the month having 30
days.
2. Two people play their games between T and R.
3. T plays Chess.
CASE 1

CASE 2
4. The person who plays Tennis, is playing
immediately after the one who plays Ludo.
5. The person who plays Ludo, is playing in the
month having 31 days.
6. The one who plays Tennis, is playing in the
month having 31 days.
Therefore, Case 1 is no longer valid.
CASE 2
7. P plays cricket, before R.
8. S plays immediately before P.
CASE 2
9. Q doesn’t play in the month having 31 days.
10. The one who plays Carrom, is playing in the
month having 31 days.
CASE 2
